A page assembled by ikigai

Every highlighted value below is a resource the in-browser kernel resolved on load — no fetch, no server. The HTML just declares which resource fills each slot (data-iki = SOURCE, data-iki-meta = META). Resolution, the endpoints, and the cache all run in this page, in WebAssembly.

data-iki="urn:fn:toUpper" data-in="resource-oriented computing"
Shout it: …

data-iki="urn:demo:greeter"
…

The greeter endpoint, describing itself

data-iki-meta="urn:demo:greeter" (META → text/plain, rendered in-page)

…

Interactive
